images.title: POS Retail Technician Execution
images.description: Professional point-of-sale system installation and configuration for national QSR chains. Multi-location deployment with verified closeout documentation and same-day completion.

images.title: Enterprise Infrastructure Deployment
images.description: HPE Alletra and composable infrastructure deployment in data center environments. Rack, cable, and verification work with structured field execution and multi-day engagement support.

images.title: Healthcare Device Calibration
images.description: GE Healthcare and medical device calibration in controlled-access healthcare environments. Access-sensitive, documentation-required field operations with compliance verification.

images.title: POS System Installation & Testing
images.description: End-to-end POS installation, setup, testing, and go-live support for retail and restaurant environments. Pre-flight verification, installation, and documented closeout per ticket.

images.title: Field Calibration Technician
images.description: Professional calibration technician performing on-site equipment verification and calibration. Structured field operations with compliance documentation and verification protocols.

images.title: Enterprise Rack & Server Infrastructure
images.description: Professional rack, stack, and server infrastructure deployment. Cable management, equipment configuration, and verification in enterprise data center environments.
